title: Big Beautiful Bill, Elon/Trump, Dollar Down Big, Harvard's Money Problems, Figma IPO
description:
(0:00) Bestie intros

(2:58) Big Beautiful Bill: Senate revision, AI regulation moratorium killed

(14:10) Clean energy subsidies phased out: What this means for energy production in the US

(25:12) Elon/Trump; US fiscal picture post-BBB

(43:26) US dollar down over 10% in 2025

(53:51) Harvard's money problems: bleeding $1B/year in fight against Trump, potential investigation over bond offerings

(1:09:13) Figma IPO, Grammarly acquires Superhuman, future of SaaS in the age of AI

analysis.summary: The episode discusses the Big Beautiful Bill, Elon Musk and Trump, the decline of the US dollar, Harvard's financial issues, and the Figma IPO. The hosts also touch on the future of SaaS in the age of AI and the acquisition of Superhuman by Grammarly. The conversation covers various topics, including AI regulation, clean energy subsidies, and the US fiscal picture.

takeaways.text: AI regulation moratorium killed in Senate revision
Harvard bleeding $1B/year in fight against Trump
Figma IPO and future of SaaS in the age of AI
Elon Musk and Trump's impact on the US economy

sentiment.notes: The hosts discuss various topics with a mix of optimism and caution, reflecting the complexity of the issues at hand.

notable_moments.description: Discussion of the Big Beautiful Bill and AI regulation moratorium
Harvard's financial issues and potential investigation
